reasons: derived candidate sample passes the initial fee-adjusted 4-candle mean gate

limitations: Candidate signals are derived from raw OHLCV feather files and recomputed indicators.

This is not a Freqtrade backtest and not a live execution-quality report.
Feather data ends on 2026-07-03 and does not include the latest runtime API rows observed on 2026-07-06.

verdict.reason: The study is offline and OHLCV-derived; it cannot authorize live strategy or configuration changes.
